evals.prompt: How do I set up an abandoned cart flow in Klaviyo?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating an abandoned cart flow in Klaviyo

assertions.name: mentions_flow_trigger
assertions.description: Mentions creating a flow triggered by a Checkout Started or Added to Cart event

assertions.name: mentions_time_delay
assertions.description: Mentions adding a time delay before sending the first message

assertions.name: mentions_personalization
assertions.description: Mentions using dynamic product blocks or catalog data for personalization

evals.prompt: I want to create a predictive segment of customers likely to churn in Klaviyo
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating a predictive churn segment in Klaviyo

assertions.name: mentions_predictive_analytics
assertions.description: Mentions predictive analytics or predicted churn risk

assertions.name: mentions_segment_filter
assertions.description: Mentions creating a segment with a churn risk filter or condition

assertions.name: mentions_order_history_requirement
assertions.description: Mentions needing sufficient order history data for predictions to work

evals.prompt: How do I track a custom event and create a profile using the Klaviyo API?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Klaviyo API to track events and create profiles

assertions.name: mentions_data_format
assertions.description: Mentions JSON:API format or the event/profile data structure
